title: Aurora pvp
description: A Minecraft PvP mod that's half done, sorry idk how to code it, will get better hopefully over the weeks to come. It works tho... only for 1.21.11 for now.
body:
# **Aurora PvP**
Built for cleaner fights and better control

_Fabric 1.21.11 • Client-side PvP utility mod_

# For server owners
If you would like to opt out of people having this client on your server, please check the versions for the Fabric server mod and Paper plugin for server opt-out. Thank you.

## UPDATED 1.7.4
_Hope you like it :3_

## **What is Aurora PvP?**

Aurora PvP is a modular PvP-focused client that improves how combat feels and plays without overcomplicating Minecraft.

The goal isn’t to overload the game with features, but to refine the parts that actually matter in PvP:

- visibility
- awareness
- control

Everything is designed to feel smooth, useful, and consistent with vanilla gameplay.

## Combat Features

Aurora PvP includes several features that help you better understand and react during fights:

- Player Outline (PvP)
- Highlights players so they’re easier to track in combat
- Target Health (Crosshair)
- Displays enemy health directly in your crosshair for faster decisions
- Damage Tracker
- Shows how much damage you’re dealing in real time
- Hit Particles
- Adds clear visual feedback when landing hits

These features give you better awareness without getting in the way of gameplay.

## Visual Improvements

The mod reduces unnecessary visual clutter and improves clarity:

- NoRender
- Removes distracting or unimportant visuals and can improve performance
- Makes it easier to see key elements during fights
- Block Overlay
- Improves block interaction visibility for building and PvP
- Movement and Control

Movement-related features are designed to make gameplay more comfortable and consistent:

- Toggle Sprint
- Toggle Sneak
- Free Look (hold key)
- Zoom (hold + scroll)

These changes don’t alter core mechanics but make movement easier to manage during fights.

## HUD and Information

Aurora PvP adds useful on-screen information without cluttering the display:

- Cyber Vitality HUD (in progress)
- Hand / Tool Durability
- Potion Effects Display
- World Time
- Facing / Degrees

All HUD elements are designed to be simple and readable.

## Customisation

All modules can be toggled through an in-game GUI.
You can choose exactly which features you want to use and configure the mod to match your playstyle.

## Visual Style

Based on the in-game experience and gallery, the mod focuses on:

- clean outlines
- minimal HUD elements
- clear particle effects
- reduced visual clutter
  
The result is a more focused and readable PvP experience.

## Development Status

Aurora PvP is still being developed.

Some features may not work perfectly yet, and improvements to stability, visuals, and UI are ongoing. More updates and features are planned.

Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader

### Final Notes

Aurora PvP is built around making combat clearer and more controlled without changing the core feel of the game.

_**If you want a cleaner PvP experience with better feedback and visibility, this mod is designed for that.**_
